# Bundled OfficeCLI

This backend bundles OfficeCLI for full-deck PPTX generation. End users do not need to install OfficeCLI separately.

- Upstream: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
- Version: 1.0.105
- Binary: `win-x64/officecli.exe`
- SHA256: `9b03133975214f7ede78fcba64c7ed968164d6f0762c27658e404cd57b41c23c`
- License: Apache License 2.0, included in `LICENSE-OfficeCLI.txt`

The backend can use a different executable during development by setting `OFFICECLI_PATH`.
